dialogue.speaker: Security Guard
dialogue.line: If you need help with anything, you can contact us at the security office.

dialogue.speaker: Hyun-su
dialogue.line: Does this place have soundproof walls?

dialogue.speaker: Hyun-su
dialogue.line: What a lame song to cover. Totally not my style.

dialogue.speaker: Hyun-su
dialogue.line: Okay, I'll just cut the corners! Heheooo Put Out.

dialogue.speaker: Hyun-su
dialogue.line: Crap, that was the last one.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Oh, have you just moved in?

dialogue.speaker: Mother
dialogue.line: Oh, it's okay, sweetie. No need to be startled. She's your neighbor.

dialogue.speaker: Mother
dialogue.line: Come on. Back to sleep. Come on, sweetie.

dialogue.speaker: Jisu
dialogue.line: Is it ringing? You're not getting in?

dialogue.speaker: Jisu
dialogue.line: Well, haha, I left my wallet. I'll hold the elevator for you.

dialogue.speaker: Hyun-su
dialogue.line: No need. I'll catch the next one.

dialogue.speaker: Jisu
dialogue.line: What's wrong with her? A poor lady, isn't she?

dialogue.speaker: Jisu
dialogue.line: A year ago, while she wasn't paying attention, the baby stroller slid down the road. And the baby got...

dialogue.speaker: Jisu
dialogue.line: Ever since then, she's become like that.

dialogue.speaker: Jisu
dialogue.line: The Lord sometimes gives us something very hard to overcome, but a person shouldn't be criticized or be an object of fear for not being able to overcome such difficulties.

dialogue.speaker: Hyun-su
dialogue.line: Well, I'm not so sure about that.

dialogue.speaker: Jisu
dialogue.line: You just moved into apartment 1510, right? I'm Jisu from apartment 1506.

dialogue.speaker: Jisu
dialogue.line: Haha, maybe I was too ahead of myself. I'm sorry if you got offended. Oh, no. My hands right now...

dialogue.speaker: Jisu
dialogue.line: Smell like cigarettes. Well, you can call me Jisu.

dialogue.speaker: Hyun-su
dialogue.line: I see. How about you? What do you do for a living?

dialogue.speaker: Jisu
dialogue.line: Well, I'm a Korean teacher. And since it's Sunday, I'm going to church right now.

dialogue.speaker: Hyun-su
dialogue.line: Oh, I see. You're a devout Christian!

dialogue.speaker: Hyun-su
dialogue.line: He's gentle, kind, and good-looking. So opposite of Hye-rang. But... still, Hye-rang's way cooler.

dialogue.speaker: Security Guard
dialogue.line: Wow, that could've been a disaster. These things are really powerful, huh?

dialogue.speaker: Security Guard
dialogue.line: I'm really sorry, kid. We don't have a lot of people who work on the weekends so... Anyway, everyone here treats the security guards like...

dialogue.speaker: Security Guard
dialogue.line: By the way, I've never seen you before. What brought you to this place?

dialogue.speaker: Hyun-su
dialogue.line: No. Crap, maybe I was too loud.

dialogue.speaker: Hyun-su
dialogue.line: Should've kept it down! Got too excited! Okay, I'm coming.

dialogue.speaker: Hyun-su
dialogue.line: Oh, I'm sorry. The security guard told me currently no one lives next door, so... I know I shouldn't be making excuses, but...

dialogue.speaker: Hyun-su
dialogue.line: What happened to your face? Are you hurt?

dialogue.speaker: Hyun-su
dialogue.line: I'm really sorry! I'll keep it down from now on. So, please.

dialogue.speaker: Hyun-su
dialogue.line: If you keep this up, I'll call the police!

dialogue.speaker: Jisu
dialogue.line: Yes, the thing. It looked just like the girl next door.

dialogue.speaker: Jisu
dialogue.line: Just what the hell's going on, boy?

dialogue.speaker: Jisu
dialogue.line: Stop calling me that. I'm a good fella. Are you okay, the noise-causing lady?

dialogue.speaker: Hyun-su
dialogue.line: Hey, have you seen the young lady who was just banging on my door? There was blood all over her face. Young lady?

dialogue.speaker: Hyun-su
dialogue.line: Have you seen a monster? It looked just like the girl next door.

summary: Hyun-su interacts with a new neighbor, Jisu, who shares a tragic story about a mother. Later, Hyun-su's loud music attracts a monstrous neighbor from apartment 1410, leading to a violent confrontation at his door, which Jisu witnesses and confirms is a monster.
